arts.ttl: Verona Secure Loan Deal for Fiorentina’s Nicolás Valentini
arts.sum: Hellas Verona have made a significant move in the final hours of the January transfer window, reaching an agreement with Fiorentina for the loan of defender Nicolás Valentini. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the deal, which comes just weeks after Valentini's arrival in Florence, will see the Argentine centre-back don the yellow and blue colours of Verona for the remainder of the season. The post Verona Secure Loan Deal for Fiorentina’s Nicolás Valentini appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Fiorentina v Genoa: Match Preview
arts.sum: Fiorentina will look to build on their recent resurgence when they host a rejuvenated Genoa side at the Stadio Artemio Franchi on Sunday afternoon. arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Late Transfer Window Push: Fagioli in the Crosshairs
arts.sum: As the January transfer window enters its final hours, Fiorentina have emerged as one of the most active clubs in the market. The Tuscan side is not only pursuing Nicolò Zaniolo but has also set their sights on Juventus midfielder Nicolò Fagioli, showcasing their ambition to strengthen the squad significantly.
